settings.custom_liquid:
<style>
  /* =========================================================
     WRAP + UPGRADE the native Shopify pickup availability block
     ========================================================= */

  /* Outer container — branded dark card */
  pickup-availability-preview{
    display: block !important;
    position: relative !important;
    margin: 14px 0 !important;
    padding: 42px 16px 16px 16px !important;
    background: #111111 !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    font-family: inherit !important;
  }

  /* "IN STOCK & READY FOR PICKUP" status label — single instance */
  pickup-availability-preview::before{
    content: "● In Stock & Ready for Pickup";
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px; left: 16px;
    font-size: 11px !important;
    letter-spacing: .14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    color: #22c55e !important;
    line-height: 1;
    animation: hd-pulse-color 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes hd-pulse-color{
    0%,100% { opacity: 1; }
    50%     { opacity: .65; }
  }

  /* Hide native checkmark icon */
  pickup-availability-preview svg{
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* "Pickup available at..." heading */
  pickup-availability-preview h3,
  pickup-availability-preview h4,
  pickup-availability-preview [class*="title"]{
    font-size: 14px !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    margin: 0 0 4px !important;
    line-height: 1.4 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
  }

  /* "Usually ready in 24 hours" + meta */
  pickup-availability-preview p,
  pickup-availability-preview small,
  pickup-availability-preview span,
  pickup-availability-preview [class*="time"],
  pickup-availability-preview [class*="stock"]{
    font-size: 12.5px !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.6) !important;
    margin: 0 0 10px !important;
    line-height: 1.4 !important;
    font-weight: 400 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
  }

  /* "View store information" link — branded CTA */
  pickup-availability-preview button,
  pickup-availability-preview a{
    display: inline-flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    font-size: 11.5px !important;
    letter-spacing: .1em !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    padding: 0 0 2px 0 !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25) !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transition: border-color .2s ease !important;
    margin-top: 4px !important;
  }
  pickup-availability-preview button:hover,
  pickup-availability-preview a:hover{
    border-color: #fff !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    color: #fff !important;
  }

  /* Arrow after CTA */
  pickup-availability-preview button::after,
  pickup-availability-preview a::after{
    content: "→";
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-left: 2px;
  }


  /* =========================================================
     UPGRADE the drawer that opens on "View store information"
     ========================================================= */

  .drawer-overlay,
  [class*="drawer"][class*="overlay"],
  dialog::backdrop{
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.75) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px) !important;
  }

  pickup-availability-drawer,
  [role="dialog"],
  .drawer,
  [class*="pickup-availability-drawer"]{
    background: #0a0a0a !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1) !important;
    box-shadow: -12px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5) !important;
  }

  .drawer__inner,
  .drawer-content,
  [class*="drawer-content"],
  [class*="drawer-panel"],
  [class*="pickup-availability-drawer"] > *{
    background: #0a0a0a !important;
    color: #fff !important;
  }

  .drawer__header,
  [class*="drawer"][class*="header"],
  pickup-availability-drawer h2,
  pickup-availability-drawer h3{
    background: #0a0a0a !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1) !important;
    padding: 20px 24px !important;
    font-size: 18px !important;
    letter-spacing: .04em !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
  }

  .drawer__close,
  [class*="drawer"][class*="close"],
  pickup-availability-drawer button[aria-label*="close" i]{
    background: transparent !important;
    color: #fff !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2) !important;
    border-radius: 50% !important;
    width: 36px !important;
    height: 36px !important;
  }

  pickup-availability-drawer li,
  [class*="pickup-availability-drawer"] li{
    background: #111 !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08) !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    padding: 18px !important;
    margin: 12px 0 !important;
    list-style: none !important;
  }

  pickup-availability-drawer a{
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: underline !important;
    text-underline-offset: 3px !important;
  }
</style>

Fit & Sizing

Classic 5 panel snapback construction

  • Adjustable snap closure
  • Structured crown
  • Mid profile fit
  • One size fits most
Shipping

Orders ship within 2 to 4 business days.

Tracking information will be emailed once the order has shipped.

Care

Spot clean recommended.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does it fit all sizes?

Yes. The adjustable snapback fits most head sizes comfortably.

How long does shipping take?

Orders ship within 2–4 business days.

Most U.S. deliveries arrive 2–4 business days after shipment.

We ship worldwide, though international delivery times may vary.

Full details can be found in our Shipping Policy.

Will this restock?

Most drops are limited and may not restock once sold out.

How do I clean the hat?

We recommend spot cleaning with a damp cloth and letting it air dry.
